name: com.cidonix.unibridge
description: Local MCP tools that let AI coding agents inspect, edit, capture, and validate Unity Editor projects through a per-project bridge and relay.

_upm.changelog:
### Improved

- assemblyFreshness now has a v2 mode based on Unity CompilationPipeline.GetAssemblies(). It checks each script assembly output against its newest source file, including asmdef, package, runtime, and editor assemblies instead of only Assembly-CSharp.dll.
- GetCompilationDiagnostics and WaitForReadyAfterReload now surface staleAssemblyCount, missingOutputAssemblyCount, staleAssemblies, and newestSourceAssemblies evidence so agents can spot stale runtime/editor assemblies after Bee or import failures.

### Previous Changes

- WaitForReadyAfterReload returns buildSystemHealth and assemblyFreshness once at the top level, while nested compilationDiagnostics is limited to retained CompilationPipeline/editor event diagnostics.
- Reload-safe relay recovery envelopes strip nested structuredContent mirrors from embedded Unity tool results, reducing duplicate payloads after refresh, compile, and Play Mode reload boundaries.
